name: Mashed Potato Salad 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes for 8 minutes, or until cooked through.
2. In a bowl, mix together the Miracle Whip, mustard, celery seed, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the boiled potatoes, chopped hard-cooked eggs, chopped onions, and chopped sweet pickle to the bowl.
4. Mix all ingredients thoroughly until combined.
